summary: Founding-docs-only repo to v1 feature-complete in one session. Built two tabs end-to-end on simulator.
completed: Xcode project initialization — Instrument Serif fonts bundled and registered, 13 design tokens as Color Sets in Assets.xcassets (light + dark)
SwiftData models — Note (id, categoryID, text, createdAt, status), Category (id, name, createdAt, sortOrder), NoteStatus enum (active, archived); CloudKit-friendly defaults on every property
ModelContainer wiring with cloudKitDatabase: .automatic via the entitlement; first-launch seed of 'Ideas / TBD' category persisted to UserDefaults under garden.tbd.categoryID
TabView shell — Notes (pencil) + Calm (leaf) with sage tint
NoteComposerView — category picker (Menu), multi-line TextField, sage Add button; empty-trim validation
CategoryChipsView — All chip + dynamic categories + dashed '+' to manage
NoteListView — @Query sorted by createdAt desc, filtered by selected category, in-memory filter (avoids predicate quirks with Codable enums)
NoteRowView — paper card with monospaced caption tags, ink body, archive button
WheatFieldView — TimelineView(.animation) + Canvas, 80 stable @State-seeded blades, sin-based sway with phase offset for traveling-wave effect
OneThingCard — checkbox + italic label, @AppStorage('garden.oneThingCheckedAt') as TimeInterval, isCheckedToday derived via Calendar.current.isDateInToday
ConfettiView — 26 pieces in palette colors (sageDeep/sageSoft/blush/wheat/sky), spring outward + fade over ~1.4s, retriggered via Int counter
Haptics — UIImpactFeedbackGenerator(.medium) on check, .notificationOccurred(.success) chained 0.15s later for confetti
ExportSheet — two-step: markdown preview with category filter + Copy + ShareLink (.md), then archive picker (Archive checked / Keep all active)
ExportMarkdown helper — groups notes by category, sorted by name, formatted dates, includes 'Exported {timestamp}' header

CategoryManagerSheet — List with Bindable rename, EditMode reorder via onMove, swipe-to-delete with confirmation dialog showing note count + 'will move to Ideas / TBD'; Ideas / TBD itself protected via tbdID guard
ArchivedNotesSection — collapsible (chevron + 'Archived (N)' header), embedded inside NoteListView's ScrollView, ArchivedNoteRow with Restore button
App icon — programmatically generated via Python+Pillow, 1024×1024 sage wheat sprig on cream, single universal slot in AppIcon.appiconset
PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy — no tracking, no domains, no collected data types, NSPrivacyAccessedAPICategoryUserDefaults with reason CA92.1
decisions: Removed GardenColors.swift from setup checklist — Xcode 15+ auto-generates Color extensions from asset catalogs, so manual extension causes 'Invalid redeclaration' errors
Path A (Xcode direct install on physical device) recommended before Path B (TestFlight) to validate on real hardware first
TestFlight Internal Testing chosen as distribution path; wife to be added as Internal Tester (no Beta App Review needed)
App icon dark and tinted variants deferred — single universal slot is sufficient for v1 (Apple falls back gracefully)
gotchas: Xcode 15+ auto-generates static vars on Color from asset catalogs — don't write your own extension Color { static let bg = Color('bg') } or you get redeclaration errors per token
SwiftData @Query predicates with Codable enum properties (like NoteStatus) are unreliable in iOS 17 — filter in memory instead
Synchronized folders in Xcode 16 mean files added to disk auto-import; deleting from disk auto-removes from project. No more pbxproj hand-editing
Bundle version in Info.plist references $(CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION) and $(MARKETING_VERSION), which live in Build Settings — don't edit Info.plist directly
next_session_starting_point: Plug in a real iPhone, ⌘R, validate the app on hardware. Tune wheat field if needed (tunables at top of WheatFieldView.swift: bladeCount, waves, periodSeconds, maxAngleDegrees). After hardware sign-off, begin Apple Developer Program enrollment — that's the gate for everything else (TestFlight, CloudKit production deploy, App Store Connect).
